text:
>>>>> "k" == kaj  <kaj@interbizz.se> writes:

 >> Number:         8468
 >> Category:       ports
 >> Synopsis:       Update print/enscript to 1.6.1
 >> Confidential:   no
 >> Severity:       non-critical
 >> Priority:       medium
 >> Responsible:    freebsd-ports
 >> State:          open
 >> Description:

 k> The port of GNU enscript is from version 1.5.0. This is an update
 k> for version 1.6.0

Sorry, a typo in that description. It is an update for version 1.6.1
(I got it right in the synopsis).

// Rasmus
